title: cirsium neumanni
intro: Cirsium neumanni, also known as the Neumann's thistle, is a species of thistle plant native to Europe. It has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium neumanni include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
